title: German Potato Fritters
description: A traditional German recipe for crispy potato fritters, perfect as a side dish or appetizer.
instructions: Grate the potatoes and onion, and squeeze out excess moisture.
In a bowl, combine the grated potatoes, onion, flour, egg, salt, and pepper. Mix well.
Heat about 1 inch of olive oil in a large frying pan over medium-high heat.
Using a spoon, drop small amounts of the potato mixture into the hot oil.
Press the mixture down slightly to form patties.
Fry for 4-5 minutes on each side, until golden brown and crispy.
Drain the fritters on paper towels.
